    Show / Hide Table of Contents

    Struct MaterialChannel

    Represents a material sub-channel, which usually contains a texture.
    Use Channels and FindChannel(string) to access it.

    Inherited Members
    ValueType.ToString()
    object.Equals(object, object)
    object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
    object.GetType()
    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public readonly struct MaterialChannel
    Remarks

    This structure is not part of the gltf schema, but wraps several components of the material to have an homogeneous and easy to use API.

    Properties

    Name Description
    Color
    HasDefaultContent
    Key
    LogicalParent
    Parameter

    Gets or sets the Vector4 parameter of this channel. The meaning of the X, Y. Z and W depend on the type of channel.
    Parameters
    Texture

    Gets the Texture instance used by this Material, or null.
    TextureCoordinate

    Gets the index of texture's TEXCOORD_[index] attribute used for texture coordinate mapping.
    TextureSampler
    TextureTransform
